description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed human figure standing on a multi-tiered stone pedestal. The figure appears to be holding an object close to its chest, possibly a book or scroll, and is rendered in a classical style with detailed drapery and facial features. At the base of the figure, there are small sculpted elements, possibly animals or symbolic objects, integrated into the pedestal. The entire sculpture is weathered, with a greenish patina and signs of moss or lichen, suggesting it is made of stone and has been exposed to the elements for some time. The pedestal is rectangular and robust, providing a stable foundation for the figure above. The sculpture is mounted on a dark, square base that contrasts with the lighter stone of the main structure.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of a robed human figure standing on a multi-tiered pedestal, with detailed drapery and a dark square base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full robed figure holding an object, with detailed facial features and pedestal decorations visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the drapery and the side profile of the figure, as well as the layered pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the robe, the figure's posture, and the pedestal's rear details.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile and the right side of the pedestal, with less detail on the face.
attribute_subject_matter: robed human figure on a pedestal
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be installed outdoors, likely in a park or urban plaza, as indicated by the weathering and moss.
